channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tipping, 6th April
item.description:
Some muppet has dumped a load of rubbish and a mattress here. Bags of smaller rubbish too. Looks likely to me that there might be an address in the smaller bags.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thorntree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 bikes chained to bike stand for 1-2 months, 6th April
item.description:
The bike stand outside Sainsburys has 2 abandoned bikes chained to it for 1-2 months. I use the bike stand regularly whenever I go to the store and the bikes have not moved in all this time . They take up space for other users including myself.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 158 - 162, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fall on footpath, 6th April
item.description:
I fell in West Way on 9 March 2026 having tripped on this uneven pathway. Apparently a neighbour fell a week before me in the same place, outside number 9. I have commented in the past about West Way where I have resided for 40 years, I feel it’s a forgotten road, the footpaths have many broken slabs, it’s a well used road for pedestrians up to Station Square. I am in my late 70’s and was lucky I did not break any bones. I look forward to your comments. I have informed Mr Fawthrop at the AGM,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazardous Giant Hogweed growing along riverside path, 6th April
item.description:
The sap of the giant hogweed plant is phototoxic. The sap contains furanocoumarins, which leads to phytophotodermatitis, a serious skin inflammation.[43] A phototoxic reaction can begin as soon as 15 minutes after contact with the sap.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Preservation Order application, 6th April
item.description:
TPO application for tree in garden of 77 Portmeadow Walk, SE2 9UN

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seacourt Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of burnt rubbish and dead fox, 6th April
item.description:
There is a pile of burnt rubbish and a dead fox on top of it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Theydon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: England flag still not removed, 6th April
item.description:
I reported this exact issue in November and nothings been done. The reference was 8433065. It’s not safe for me to remove this myself, please give me an ETA thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 6th April
item.description:
Dog fouling

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street loggy not working, 6th April
item.description:
Street light not working, safert concern

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Upper Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 6th April
item.description:
This car has been there for months, no number plates front or back, deflated tyres.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramhope Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Prominent graffiti on bike shelter, 6th April
item.description:
Unsightly prominent graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maitland Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Trip hazard, 6th April
item.description:
A large pinkish paving slab outside the front of Pizza GoGo is rocking. It is a serious trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Queensway, Petts Wood, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Tunnel Avenue, 6th April
item.description:
Flytipping has been going on in this location for a long time next to the Radisson Hotel on Tunnel Avenue, opposite Peterboat Close. Having it pile up here just encourages others to do the same. I will report the trolleys to Trolleywise, but the council needs to clean up this location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Peterboat Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox body on the pavement, 6th April
item.description:
There has been a dead fox by the pavement at St Paul terrace since Easter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Paul's Terrace, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is not allowed on Pedestrian only Datchelor Place, 6th April
item.description:
It hs been moved to the top of the street where it is also not allowed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Following up on Tree planting request, 6th April
item.description:
I have a ref 8192342 As mentioned in earlier heading I’m following up on my request for a replacement tree which was made in September 2025 following a young tree that fell over into the road which the Council kindly moved promptly. It was a Rowan tree but ed don’t like that tree as it doesn’t have a nice rounded shape and it sheds all those red berries. If possible we’d like a more umbellous shaped tree with a bit of girth rather then a tall conical shape tree which is not attractive in a residential situation and has the added disadvantage of being so straight and erect, that it can snap in high winds.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ardlui Road SE27 by Idmiston Road junctio, 6th April
item.description:
Ardlui Road SE27 by Idmiston Road junction at the side of 33 Idmiston Road front garden is a green plastic road sweeper’s rubbish bag bin (on Ardlui Road) which is graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin , picture & Google Streetview link: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4360528,-0.0990238,3a,75y,256.46h,64.36t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1s4PXVeKsvWs3jBmZEwHDf-Q!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D25.643112709532858%26panoid%3D4PXVeKsvWs3jBmZEwHDf-Q%26yaw%3D256.46200023245717!7i16384!8i8192?authuser=0&entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDQwMS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Idmiston Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over the payment, 6th April
item.description:
Pavement full of rubbish from a rave or club night Ilderton road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ilderton Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30 Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping, 6th April
item.description:
Metal object is on the pavement with sharp edges, could hurt a pedestrian and blocking the pavement of clear access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag in the tree, 6th April
item.description:
A black bin bag is caught in the tree and has been there for a whole year. A neighbor hood eye sore and it isn’t coming down on its own. Removal would be much appreciated

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
